scenes.location: night train through the glass district
scenes.palette: deep blue, sodium amber, wet silver

shots.subject: train suspended between rain-covered towers
shots.purpose: establish the glass city and isolation

shots.subject: 07:41:09 pulse repeating in a window reflection
shots.purpose: introduce the anomaly without a voice

shots.subject: Zhou Heng and Lin Yao divided by the dark window seam
inactive archive desks reflected into false depth
shots.purpose: make an empty public space feel watchful

shots.subject: invalid witness hash on Lin Yao's portable panel
shots.motion: focus pull from badge to hash

shots.subject: both standing outside the same pool of window light
shots.purpose: preserve distrust after the shared record appears

shots.subject: two chairs facing one narrow service display
shots.purpose: force shared attention without forced intimacy

shots.subject: timestamp 07:41:09 beside a broken checksum ring
shots.purpose: identify the signal as unfinished data

shots.subject: Lin Yao reflected over Zhou Heng's missing timeline
shots.purpose: connect professional guilt to the erased interval

scenes.palette: black glass, cyan trace, white rain

shots.subject: trace crossing several towers through rainwater bridges
shots.purpose: show the city itself becoming the route

shots.subject: their hands near but not touching as the trace responds
shots.purpose: visualize paired endpoints without romantic shorthand

shots.subject: diagnostic signature and fragmented corridor image
shots.purpose: separate public evidence from private memory

scenes.palette: soft gray, three restrained indicator colors

shots.subject: two seats and three unselected disposition panels
shots.purpose: make the tradeoff legible and neutral

shots.subject: each character states a boundary
shots.purpose: give consent language room to land

shots.subject: all three panels remain unselected

scenes.palette: city black, wet cyan, distant amber

shots.subject: the pair centered above a field of lit windows
shots.purpose: place the private choice inside public infrastructure

shots.subject: both repeat the consequences before the choice
three plain text options with equal visual weight
old antenna dishes behind rain-streaked glass
public proof and private memory separated into two sealed layers
dual attestation completed side by side
shots.purpose: show responsibility as a joint act

scenes.palette: cold white, warning amber, clean cyan

shots.subject: proof hash appearing across public panes
shots.purpose: show disclosure without displaying private content

shots.subject: patch escrow and evidence release share one countdown
Zhou Heng and Lin Yao watch rather than celebrate
maintenance panes cycling to a public advisory
shots.purpose: show public consequence without adding characters

shots.subject: their reflections finally occupy the same pane
shots.purpose: close the truth route on chosen proximity

shots.subject: lights extinguish behind the pair in sequence
abstract corridor geometry with no third figure
shots.purpose: show a shared fragment without creating a new actor

shots.subject: both maintain the purge controls

scenes.palette: warm gray fading to neutral white

shots.subject: memory index lights go dark between two consoles
Lin Yao reads Zhou Heng's name as new information
the pair step back into professional distance
clean glass with no signal reflection
a returned maintenance stylus passes between them
shots.purpose: leave a trace of courtesy without recovered memory

shots.subject: they leave in opposite directions
shots.motion: camera stays on the empty seam

shots.subject: the pair walk while defining channel limits
dual keys, timeout, bandwidth cap, and audit chain
shots.purpose: show the controlled channel as a real system

shots.subject: separate confirmations on two devices

scenes.palette: black, narrow cyan lines, red abort marker

shots.subject: two thin light paths meet only inside a bounded frame
raw cache replay denied and channel auto-closes
both wait before requesting a second window
the city glass returns to ordinary reflections
shots.purpose: separate the channel from the storm

shots.subject: sealed disclosure deadline set to seventy-two hours
they leave the channel closed and speak face to face
